what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel attachment: it declares an attachment identifier, the channel it belongs to, an attachment type, a target board item URI, and an added timestamp.
observations: No body content after the frontmatter
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-fc19548c
The attachment_type board_items indicates it links to a board item rather than containing inline content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Stores channel attachments as Markdown files under channel-memory/channel_attachments/
References external artifacts via a URI in a target field
Includes an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone in an added field
concerns: File contains only metadata and no payload or description of the attachment itself
The board:// target cannot be resolved or verified from within this file alone
No author or provenance information is recorded
notes: A thin, timestamped metadata stub that links a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-fc19548c.
questions: What is the content or title of board item item-fc19548c?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is there a corresponding attachment payload or is this reference the complete record?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about expected behavior or rendering?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to record an attachment reference, and it does exactly that via typed metadata; purpose and actual align.
apparent_themes: Traceability between channel discussions and board items
Lightweight reference records over embedded content
intention_signals: It is trying to create a durable, typed link from a channel attachment to a specific board item so the attachment can be located in context later.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme in the target field is a distinct convention for cross-referencing board items.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed edge between a channel attachment and a board item, which a fused system could use to reconstruct cross-references and audit when the link was created.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in dragnet-development that references board item item-fc19548c with type board_items and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a specific board item was attached to the dragnet-development channel at a known time.
